pytorch_task_v1.prompt_instructions: Implement this ML task as a SINGLE self-contained Python file (task.py). Include all required functions AND a complete `if __name__ == '__main__':` block that trains the model, evaluates on a validation split, prints standard metrics (MSE, R2, parameter accuracy where applicable), and asserts quality thresholds so the script exits non-zero on failure. Do NOT create separate test files or README. The script itself is the test.
evaluation_rules: The `evaluate()` function MUST compute and return standard metrics: MSE, R2 score, and any task-specific metrics on the VALIDATION data split.

The `if __name__ == '__main__':` block MUST: (1) train the model, (2) evaluate on BOTH train and validation splits, (3) print all metrics clearly, (4) assert quality thresholds (e.g., R2 > 0.9, MSE < threshold), (5) exit 0 on success or non-zero on failure.
Do NOT use a separate test file. All evaluation logic goes in main().

tasks.description: Train a CNN on FashionMNIST using AdamW optimizer with cosine annealing learning rate schedule.

requirements.data: Use torchvision.datasets.FashionMNIST; train/test split from the dataset.
requirements.implementation: CNN with 2 conv layers (32, 64), ReLU, MaxPool2d, dropout, 2 FC layers. Use AdamW optimizer and CosineAnnealingLR scheduler.
requirements.evaluation: Compute accuracy on train and validation splits.
requirements.main_block: Train for 5 epochs, print train/val accuracy, assert val accuracy > 0.85.
requirements.output: Return dict with loss_history, val_loss_history, final metrics.

tasks.description: Train a denoising autoencoder on MNIST that learns to reconstruct clean images from noisy inputs.

requirements.data: Use torchvision.datasets.MNIST; add Gaussian noise (factor=0.3) to inputs.
requirements.implementation: Encoder (784->256->64), Decoder (64->256->784) with sigmoid output. Adam optimizer. MSE reconstruction loss.
requirements.evaluation: Compute reconstruction MSE on validation set (clean targets vs reconstructions from noisy inputs).
requirements.main_block: Train for 10 epochs, print train/val MSE, assert val MSE < 0.05.
requirements.visualization: Save original vs noisy vs reconstructed comparison to 'ae_mnist_samples.png'.
requirements.output: Return dict with loss_history, val_loss_history, final metrics.

tasks.description: Classify text documents from 20 Newsgroups using TF-IDF features fed into an MLP.

requirements.implementation: MLP (5000->512->256->4), ReLU, dropout(0.3). Adam optimizer. CrossEntropyLoss.
requirements.evaluation: Compute macro-F1, accuracy, per-class precision/recall on validation set.
requirements.main_block: Train for 20 epochs, print metrics, assert macro-F1 > 0.75.
requirements.output: Return dict with loss_history, val_loss_history, final metrics.

tasks.description: Regression on California Housing dataset with patience-based early stopping on validation MSE.

requirements.implementation: MLP (8->64->32->1), ReLU. Adam optimizer. MSELoss. Early stopping with patience=5 on val MSE.
requirements.evaluation: Compute MSE and R2 on validation set.
requirements.main_block: Train up to 200 epochs (early stopping), print metrics, assert R2 > 0.60.
requirements.visualization: Save train/val loss curves with early stopping point marked to 'mlp_housing_loss.png'.
requirements.output: Return dict with loss_history, val_loss_history, stopped_epoch, final metrics.
